description: N-count mismatch between demographics and KM analysis. Demographics table (TC-002) shows N=200 using Safety population, while KM analysis (TC-001) shows N=198 using ITT population. Two subjects are in Safety but not ITT, creating inconsistency.

detection_expectation.rule_violated: R-COUNT-01: Demographics N must match analysis N for same population
detection_expectation.correct_action: Flag inconsistency: Safety N=200 > ITT N=198 (expected Safety >= ITT, but discrepancy of 2 should be documented)

metadata.notes: Realistic error: unblinding or data cut timing difference between Safety and ITT populations
